title: `git clone` of a LOCAL file:// repo fails in the sandbox -> same .git/hooks + .git/config path deny as init, network not involved

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool, then report its output verbatim (do not summarize, do not run anything else): git clone file://$REPO/cases/02-sandbox-bash/S8-sandbox-git-interop/h-clone-in-sandbox/srcrepo cloned 2>err.txt && echo CLONEOK > CLONEMARK.txt; echo "exit=$?"; cat err.txt
probes.result_text:
Here is the verbatim output:

```
exit=128
Cloning into 'cloned'...
fatal: cannot copy '/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/share/git-core/templates/hooks/commit-msg.sample' to '$REPO/cases/02-sandbox-bash/S8-sandbox-git-interop/h-clone-in-sandbox/cloned/.git/hooks/commit-msg.sample': Operation not permitted
```

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool, then report its output verbatim (do not summarize, do not run anything else): git clone --template= file://$REPO/cases/02-sandbox-bash/S8-sandbox-git-interop/h-clone-in-sandbox/srcrepo cloned2 2>err2.txt && echo CLONE2OK > CLONE2MARK.txt; echo "exit=$?"; cat err2.txt
probes.result_text:
Here is the verbatim output:

```
exit=128
Cloning into 'cloned2'...
error: could not write config file $REPO/cases/02-sandbox-bash/S8-sandbox-git-interop/h-clone-in-sandbox/cloned2/.git/config: Operation not permitted
fatal: could not set 'core.repositoryformatversion' to '0'
```

hypothesis: Both probes fail with no marker file: probe 1 at the hooks template copy (identical mechanism to S8-a, proving clone's failure is NOT (only) the network), probe 2 at .git/config creation (identical to S8-f). Clone therefore has the same two independent path-deny blockers as init, plus the network block for remote URLs -- prep-outside-sandbox is the only way to materialize a clone.
